mapper.select: WITH DETAIL_DATA AS ( SELECT A.write_year , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , B.reg_dt , B.cnt , B.hr_id FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info A , (SELECT MAX(reg_dt) reg_dt , COUNT(doc_no) cnt , hr_id , MAX(created_at) created_at FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND write_year = #{writeYear} GROUP BY hr_id) B WHERE A.hr_id = B.hr_id AND A.reg_dt = B.reg_dt and A.created_at = B.created_at ), HR_LIST as ( select A.write_year , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.comp_id , A.hr_id , A.created_at , A.created_by , A.updated_at , A.updated_by , case when (select COUNT(*) from esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info B where B.use_yn = 'Y' AND B.write_year = #{writeYear} AND B.hr_id = A.hr_id ) > 0 then 'Y' else 'N' end use_yn , A.reg_dt from (SELECT hr_id , created_at , ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY hr_id ORDER BY created_at DESC) AS rn , write_year , doc_type , doc_no , comp_id , created_by , updated_at , updated_by , reg_dt FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info WHERE write_year = #{writeYear}) A where A.rn = 1 ) SELECT A.write_year , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.comp_id , A.hr_id , B.hr_nm , A.use_yn , C.reg_dt , COALESCE(C.cnt, 0) AS cnt , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM esg.tb_approval_info T1 WHERE T1.target_id IN (SELECT T2.write_year || T2.doc_no FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info T2 WHERE T2.hr_id = A.hr_id AND t2.write_year = #{writeYear}) AND T1.target_type = 'WOOHA' AND T1.signature IS NOT null AND T1.param = 'writer') writer_cnt , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM esg.tb_approval_info T1 WHERE T1.target_id IN (SELECT T2.write_year || T2.doc_no FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info T2 WHERE T2.hr_id = A.hr_id AND t2.write_year = #{writeYear}) AND T1.target_type = 'WOOHA' AND T1.signature IS NOT null AND T1.param = 'reviewer') reviewer_cnt , A.created_at , A.created_by , A.updated_at , A.updated_by , CASE WHEN E.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 'I' WHEN D.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 'W' ELSE 'C' END AS approval_status FROM HR_LIST A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info B ON A.hr_id = B.hr_id LEFT JOIN DETAIL_DATA C on a.hr_id = c.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info D ON D.target_type = C.doc_type AND D.target_id = C.write_year||C.doc_no AND D.param = 'writer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info E ON E.target_type = C.doc_type AND E.target_id = C.write_year||C.doc_no AND E.param = 'reviewer' WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY A.use_yn desc, C.reg_dt desc

SELECT A.write_year , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.reg_dt || CASE when A.use_yn = 'N' then ' - (미사용)' else '' END AS title_reg_dt , A.reg_dt , A.hr_id , A.worker_opinion , A.reviewer_opinion , A.workplace_id , C.workplace_nm , A.use_yn , A.created_at , A.created_by , A.updated_at , A.updated_by , B.experience_no , B.content , 'U' cmd FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_experience B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no AND A.reg_dt = B.reg_dt LEFT JOIN esg.tb_workplace_info C ON A.workplace_id = C.workplace_id WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.hr_id = #{hrId} ORDER BY A.USE_YN = 'Y' DESC, A.reg_dt desc, A.created_at desc, A.updated_at desc

SELECT A.write_year , A.doc_type , A.doc_no , A.reg_dt || CASE when A.use_yn = 'N' then ' - (미사용)' else '' END AS title_reg_dt , A.reg_dt , A.hr_id , A.worker_opinion , A.reviewer_opinion , A.workplace_id , C.workplace_nm , A.use_yn , A.created_at , A.created_by , A.updated_at , A.updated_by , B.experience_no , B.content , 'U' cmd FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_experience B ON A.write_year = B.write_year AND A.doc_type = B.doc_type AND A.doc_no = B.doc_no AND A.reg_dt = B.reg_dt LEFT JOIN esg.tb_workplace_info C ON A.workplace_id = C.workplace_id WHERE A.hr_id = #{hrId} AND TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.reg_dt, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY') = #{writeYear} ORDER BY A.USE_YN = 'Y' DESC,A.reg_dt desc
SELECT HR_NM FROM ESG.TB_HR_INFO WHERE HR_ID = #{hrId}

SELECT A.reg_dt , A.hr_id , '○ 유해·위험 경험의 원인과 반성할 점' || E'\n' || A.worker_opinion AS worker_opinion , '○ 경험에 대한 조언' || E'\n' || A.reviewer_opinion AS reviewer_opinion , B1.hr_id as writer_id , B1.hr_nm as writer_nm , B2.hr_id as reviewer_id , B2.hr_nm as reviewer_nm , C.workplace_nm FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info B1 ON B1.target_type = A.doc_type AND B1.target_id = A.write_year || A.doc_no AND B1.param = 'writer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info B2 ON B2.target_type = A.doc_type AND B2.target_id = A.write_year || A.doc_no AND B2.param = 'reviewer' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_workplace_info C ON A.workplace_id = C.workplace_id WHERE A.write_year = #{writeYear} AND A.doc_type = #{docType} AND A.doc_no = #{docNo} AND A.reg_dt = #{regDt}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, reg_dt, comp_id, hr_id, workplace_id, worker_opinion, reviewer_opinion, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, 'WOOHA', (select COALESCE(LPAD(TRIM(TO_CHAR(MAX(doc_no)::INTEGER + 1, '99999')), 5, '0'), '00001') from esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_info WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = 'WOOHA'), #{regDt}, #{compId}, #{hrId}, #{workplaceId}, #{workerOpinion}, #{reviewerOpinion}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} ) RETURNING doc_no

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(experience_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS experienceNo FROM esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_experience WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType} and doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_workers_opinions_on_hazards_experience ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, reg_dt, experience_no, content, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{regDt}, #{experienceNo}, #{content}, 'Y', now(), #{createdBy} )
